articles.title: Dogecoin’s Astronomical Flight To $1 Price Looks Nigh As Tesla Officially Adds DOGE Payment Option
articles.description: Elon Musk’s favorite cryptocurrency, Dogecoin (DOGE), has formally been included on Tesla’s website as one of the EV maker’s official modes of payment.

articles.title: XRP and Uniswap Networks Surge in Popularity Amid Growing Investor Interest
articles.description: XRP and Uniswap have demonstrated a considerable increase in the number of new addresses. This growth reflects heightened investor interest and expanding market activity. XRP and Uniswap See Significant Increase Ripple’s XRP has experienced a 7% increase in non-empty addresses in the past six months, rising to 5.2 million.
